name: Globalstar, Inc.
summary: Mobile Satellite Services Business Through its global satellite network, Globalstar, Inc. (we, us or the Company) provides Mobile Satellite Services (MSS), including voice and data communications services to retail, business and governmental customers as well as wholesale satellite capacity services. We offer these services over our network of in-orbit satellites and ground stations (gateways) pursuant to our spectrum licenses, which we refer to collectively as the Globalstar System.
